_meta.source: FMP MCP connector (quote endpoint for VIX; premarket/news scan for flags)
_meta.note: Companion file for the dip/pop OHLCV feed (dip_pop_ohlcv.csv). Overwritten each run (not appended) — always reflects the latest snapshot, refreshed at premarket and market-close task runs. Flag values: Normal | Caution | Avoid. Avoid should gate a green technical verdict; Caution should annotate it. Derived from the daily macro calendar (CPI/PCE/jobs/FOMC/ISM), ticker-specific news, and the mandatory AI/semiconductor competitive-landscape query — see CLAUDE.md.
_meta.category_note: Added July 13, 2026 for Claude for Excel's Option 2 flag-gating burn-in. category = the primary driver behind the flag, one of: macro-scheduled (scheduled CPI/PCE/jobs/FOMC/ISM release) | sector-contagion (a related name's move, e.g. a direct competitor) | single-name (catalyst specific to this ticker) | geopolitical (broad market-wide event unrelated to a specific company or scheduled release) | other. Gate logic currently treats all categories uniformly until burn-in data justifies differential weighting — see dip_pop_flag_history.csv for the append-only log used to test that.
